industry_news_cn.title: Lloyd's profit crosses £10bn in strong full-year results - Insurance Times
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 劳合社全年利润突破100亿英镑，创历史强劲业绩
industry_news_cn.display_title: 劳合社全年利润突破100亿英镑，创历史强劲业绩
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 劳合社（Lloyd's of London）公布全年业绩，净利润首次突破100亿英镑大关，创下历史新高。这一强劲表现得益于承保纪律的严格执行、投资收益的增长以及巨灾损失的相对可控。劳合社市场整体承保利润率显著提升，彰显其在全球保险与再保险市场中的核心竞争力。

industry_news_cn.title: Eversheds Sutherland Taps Phyllis Young as Texas Finance Partner - Bloomberg Law News
industry_news_cn.description: Eversheds Sutherland Taps Phyllis Young as Texas Finance Partner. March 19, 2026, 5:57 PM UTC. Phyllis Young joined Eversheds Sutherland as a partner in its finance practice in Houston, the firm announced Thursday. Young advises on secured lending, debt finance, project finance, restructuring, com...
industry_news_cn.title_cn: Eversheds Sutherland任命Phyllis Young为德州金融业务合伙人
industry_news_cn.display_title: Eversheds Sutherland任命Phyllis Young为德州金融业务合伙人
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 国际律所Eversheds Sutherland宣布任命Phyllis Young为其休斯顿办公室金融业务合伙人。Young擅长担保贷款、债务融资、项目融资及企业重组等领域的法律服务，她的加入将进一步强化该律所在美国南部金融法律服务市场的业务能力。

industry_news_cn.title: February 2026 Monthly Release - Company Announcement - Financial Times
industry_news_cn.description: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) today announced estimated catastrophe losses for the month of February of $140 million or $111 million, after-tax. Allstate Protection policies in force are as follows.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 好事达公司公布2026年2月巨灾损失预估达1.4亿美元
industry_news_cn.display_title: 好事达公司公布2026年2月巨灾损失预估达1.4亿美元
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 好事达公司（Allstate Corporation，NYSE: ALL）发布公告，2026年2月预估巨灾损失约为1.4亿美元，税后约1.11亿美元。该公司同时披露了好事达保护业务的有效保单数据，反映了冬季极端天气事件对美国财产险市场的持续影响。

tech_news_cn.title: Aviva claims industry first with new AI underwriting tool for CI cover - Insurance Times
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 英杰华推出业内首创AI核保工具，用于重大疾病保险保障
tech_news_cn.display_title: 英杰华推出业内首创AI核保工具，用于重大疾病保险保障
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 英国保险巨头英杰华集团（Aviva）宣布推出业内首个专门针对重大疾病保险的AI核保工具。该工具利用人工智能技术自动评估重大疾病风险，大幅提升核保效率和准确性。此举标志着AI技术在人寿与健康保险核保领域取得重大突破，有望引领行业数字化转型新趋势。

tech_news_cn.title: Viewpoint: Driving Sustainable Underwriting Performance With Data and Discipline - Insurance Journal
tech_news_cn.description: In this environment, having a deep understanding of how risks interact and diversify within insurers' portfolios has become an even more critical pillar of underwriting strategy, enabling sustainable, profitable growth while maintaining focus on exposure management and underwriting discipline.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 观点：以数据驱动和承保纪律实现可持续承保业绩
tech_news_cn.display_title: 观点：以数据驱动和承保纪律实现可持续承保业绩
tech_news_cn.display_desc: Insurance Journal发表深度观点文章，探讨在当前市场环境下如何通过数据分析和承保纪律实现可持续的盈利增长。文章强调，深入理解保险组合中风险之间的交互与分散效应已成为承保战略的核心支柱。在保持风险敞口管理的同时，数据驱动决策是实现长期稳定收益的关键。

tech_news_cn.title: Nick Studer appointed president and CEO of Marsh Risk - Consulting.us
tech_news_cn.description: Nick Studer has been appointed as president and CEO of Marsh Risk, a global provider of insurance broking and risk management services, effective April 1. Insurance broking and risk services subsidiary Marsh was renamed Marsh Risk.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: Nick Studer被任命为Marsh Risk总裁兼首席执行官
tech_news_cn.display_title: Nick Studer被任命为Marsh Risk总裁兼首席执行官
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 全球领先的保险经纪和风险管理服务供应商达信（Marsh）宣布，其保险经纪和风险服务子公司正式更名为Marsh Risk，同时任命Nick Studer为总裁兼首席执行官，4月1日起生效。此次品牌升级和管理层变动旨在进一步强化其全球风险管理服务能力。

tech_news_cn.title: Lloyd's CEO Says It's Critical Mideast War Cover Stays Available - Insurance Journal
tech_news_cn.description: The Lloyd's of London insurance market will continue to provide cover for vessels traveling through the Strait of Hormuz even as shipowners avoid the area, according to chief executive officer Patrick Tiernan.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 劳合社CEO强调继续提供中东战争风险保险至关重要
tech_news_cn.display_title: 劳合社CEO强调继续提供中东战争风险保险至关重要
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 劳合社首席执行官Patrick Tiernan表示，尽管船东纷纷避开霍尔木兹海峡区域，劳合社市场仍将继续为途经该地区的船舶提供战争风险保险保障。劳合社市场协会已确认该地区的船舶保险仍然可用。这一表态在全球地缘政治风险上升的背景下，凸显了劳合社作为全球保险市场基石的关键作用。
